text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
"That freshly steamed rice and grilled salmon 
sure hit the spot…"?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! D-Did I say that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, just a good guess. 
Figured you'd be thinking 'bout food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's amazing, Tama…! 
You'll be a great fortune teller one day!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, it's always been a dream of mine… 
Hol'it, whatchu on about!?
